description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Thursday, I attended the National Traffic Safety Campaign Spring Kickoff held at the Soyanagicho District Administrative Center as a guest.

This kickoff was held to align the intentions of the police department, local government, and traffic safety organizations toward traffic safety, build momentum in the community, and raise public awareness of traffic accident prevention.

Moving forward, we will continue to work together with all relevant agencies to prevent traffic accidents.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13405.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: National Traffic Safety Campaign Spring Kickoff (Reiwa 8)
